plans.title: Context Assembly Basic
plans.notes: Unblock when sync-contract exposes required bundle metadata fields.

metadata.description: Implement Context Assembly basic version — CLI-side only (summary generation + Local API call + bundle metadata). Platform-side service belongs in private nexus-platform repo.
metadata.blocked_reason: Architecture review found fundamental tech stack conflict. Wave 0 restructure complete. Blocked on sync-contract for bundle metadata.
metadata.next_action: Wave 2+: implement CLI-side scope after sync-contract completion
metadata.dependency: Blocked by sync-contract plan for bundle metadata fields

notes.message: Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. Phase 1+ plans require feature branches.
Phase 0 complete: monorepo-structure, json-schema-foundation, codegen-pipeline all done. 15 commits on main. Ready for Phase 1.
Phase 1 Wave 0-1.5 complete: Architecture review, domain-models implementation (15 aggregates, 133 tests), QC三审, Critical fixes (C-1, C-2) verified.
domain-models merged to main. Residual findings recorded for cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, acp-client, context-assembly, and domain-models (non-blocking QC items).
